title: Mo' Creatures StationAPI
description: DrShark's Mo' Creatures from beta 1.7.3 on Babric + StationAPI
body:
# Mo' Creatures b1.7.3 with Multiplayer support
![mocreatures mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47408738547befce53dbf6566dba021bd5468d15.png)
### Enable extra mobs in ModMenu's mod settings in "Spawn Limits" config
extra mobs (not present in v2.12.2 oryginally) : Zebra, Elephant, Hippo, Giraffe, Crocodile, Camel, Mummy, Scorpion, Turtle, Ray, *Collie *(only with Sheep Grazing enabled)
## New Settings
- Ogre Explosions destroying blocks
- Fire Ogre Igniting blocks
- Cave Ogre drop balance (damaged tools and armor instead of Diamonds)
- Spawning of Hunter Creatures near torches
- Horse drop Saddle
- Horse speed boost glitch (with mouse, bird, mouse)
- Dolphin Shallow Bogging
- Is SugarLump food item
- Easy Saddle/Medallion Recipe
- Apple/Golden Apple tame horses (green apple does it instead)
- Extra Mobs
- Sheep Grazing
- Horse Fuel System
- Dolphin Diving

# New Features 
## Horse, Dolphin, Turtle Locking
Animal owner can lock it with Sword+Sneak+Right Click. Locked Animal cannot be ridden, roped, opened, picked by other Player. Hearts = Public, Flames = Locked.

![animal locking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/824864cec5e0a77b1ea899dafb13e9834c71d02d.png)

## Dolphin Diving
Oryginal Physics can be switched on in settings

![dolphin diving](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29ac3cc1edb1eb04bb9f45d55b9801955bb05e65_0.webp)

## Sheep Grazing (Disabled by default)
Feature designed in opposition to harder wool farming caused by lesser chance of spawning sheeps. Sheeps can be tamed by feeding them Wheat, as soon as it eats one put a Bell Item on it. Use Rope to bring them in to the farm. About half of a minecraft day after shearing, they will start consuming Tall Grass, Dentalion and Grass to regrow wool. Keep your sheeps away from Wild Wolves.

Use Collie dogs for mass navigation of tamed Sheeps. They spawn on snowy biomes on levels exceeding 100. To tame Collie you need one Elephant Tusk. Collie collars are colorable.

![sheep grazing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6081ac77ed8c347c55ba88d7e14771c790865839_0.webp)

## Extra Mobs (Disabled by default)

![savanna mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44629de79c07163aecf83326016e562baabf238a_0.webp)

## Horse Fuel System (Disabled by default)  
Feature aiming to balance travelling by Horse, could fit in factions server.
While riding horse, press H (Horse Fuel Key in Controls) to open its "Stomach"
Put Haystack or SugarLump inside to give horse energy to travel. Energy won't waste when horse has no passanger. 

![stomach](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49e08ec3bde63adf003c1b4e2fd7688a0253c441.png)

## Other Features/Tweaks
- Open Horse chest with Sneak+Right Click 
- Switch BigCat protecting its owner with Sword+Right Click
- Pack Horses have bigger chest
- Turtle has storage in its shell which expands as it grows
- Horses and Dolphins have orange health bar when ready for breeding
- Horses that are no longer able to breed have darker health bar
- Green Apple tames horses instead of Regular and Golden ones
- Werewolf drop Green Apple
- 2 new Achievements: Horse Mastery, Dolphin Mastery
